message:
fix(vdbe): propagate column collation to MIN/MAX aggregate comparisons (bd-ox2mg)

VDBE codegen only resolved collation for DISTINCT aggregates, so
MIN(col)/MAX(col) on COLLATE NOCASE columns used binary comparison.
Fix: (1) codegen emits P4::FuncNameCollated for MIN/MAX when the
argument column has a non-BINARY collation, (2) engine intercepts
AggStep for collated MIN/MAX and uses collation-aware comparison
instead of the default binary PartialOrd.

Un-ignores test_conformance_collate_nocase_min_max_s69cj2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
